question: Based on this product revenue by channel chart (as of March 2024), what can we reasonably conclude about the most recent year shown?

options.A: We cannot draw firm conclusions about the full year’s revenue because the latest bar only includes data through March 2024.
options.B: The latest year confirms a long-term collapse in overall product revenue compared with all previous years.
options.C: All three channels have permanently become unprofitable in the latest year.
options.D: The latest year proves that online revenue will stay lower than retail revenue for the rest of the year.

explanation: The latest year includes only about 4 months of data, whereas earlier bars represent full-year totals. Stacking the partial-year totals next to full-year bars makes the latest year look dramatically worse across all channels, but this is a consequence of inappropriate aggregation of time, not a true performance collapse.
